# Chapter 4: Dynamics: kinematics and Newton's laws  (~100 pp)
- 4.1 Position, velocity, acceleration in 1D, 2D, 3D (15) · 4.2 Rotational kinematics (15) · 4.3 Newton's second law applied (15) · 4.4 Work-energy theorem (12) · 4.5 Impulse-momentum (12) · 4.6 Conservation of momentum (12) · 4.7 Worked examples: projectile, oscillating cart, spinning top (10) · 4.8 Failure section: rotating machinery imbalance (9)

**Archetype**: balance, transport. **Project**: measure the trajectory of a thrown object with video; fit a model. **Exercises**: 35.
